evidence.claim: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users

evidence.claim: Improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14% via recommendation system launch
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.

evidence.claim: Developed semantic search for internal knowledge base of ~500K documents
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents.

evidence.claim: Improved search-relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup

evidence.claim: Used collaborative filtering, content-based ranking, sentence-transformer embeddings, gradient-boosted models, and feature pipelines
evidence.source_text: combined collaborative filtering with content-based ranking. The system uses item-item similarity (via sentence-transformer embeddings) for cold starts and a gradient-boosted model trained on engagement signals for warm users. Most of my time went into the feature pipeline (~200 features)

evidence.claim: Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2, bge-base), FAISS, and query expansion modules
evidence.source_text: Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 initially, later upgraded to bge-base) with FAISS for fast nearest-neighbor retrieval. Designed the query expansion module

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Values practical experience over academic theory
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Self-directed learning through shipping production systems
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
Most of my time went into the feature pipeline (~200 features) and the A/B testing infrastructure.

evidence.claim: No explicit evidence of leading or mentoring people
